description: Track A — Business Owner / Entrepreneur path. 8–10 adaptive questions. Produces an AI Readiness Score (0–100) and tier label. Doubles as a soft lead funnel without feeling like a sales form.

questions.question: How would you describe your current use of AI tools?

options.label: Never used AI in my business
I use Claude or ChatGPT occasionally for writing stuff
I have a couple of AI tools integrated into my workflow
AI is already deeply embedded in how we operate

questions.question: What kind of business do you run?

options.label: Med spa / wellness / aesthetics
Dental or healthcare practice
Home services (plumbing, HVAC, landscaping, etc.)
Restaurant / food & beverage
Professional services (legal, accounting, consulting)
E-commerce / retail
Other

questions.question: How many people work in your business (including you)?

options.label: Just me

questions.question: How does your business handle day-to-day operations right now?

options.label: Pen-and-paper, spreadsheets, or it's all in my head
Basic tools — Google Calendar, email, maybe a simple website
Real software — CRM, scheduling platform, accounting tool
Systems are connected — automations, integrations, everything talks to each other

questions.question: What's eating the most time in your business right now? (Pick up to 3)

options.label: Answering the same questions from leads/clients over and over
Scheduling, rescheduling, no-shows
Following up with leads who go cold
Onboarding new clients or staff
Manual data entry or reporting
Social media / content creation
I don't know — that's kind of the problem

questions.question: What's held you back from trying AI in your business?

options.label: I don't know where to start
I'm worried about the cost
I'm not sure it's right for my type of business
I tried it once and it didn't work well
Honestly, I just haven't had time to figure it out

questions.question: Which of these wins would get you most excited?
questions.subtitle: Scenarios are personalized to your business type.

options.label: A patient calls at 11pm, books themselves, and you wake up to a full calendar
Every lead who ghosted after the first inquiry gets a smart follow-up that brings them back
Your front desk handles 80% of FAQs without involving a single staff member
You get a weekly AI-generated report showing which services are actually driving revenue
New patients schedule, get reminders, and receive post-care instructions — all before your staff arrives
Overdue patients get personalized reactivation messages that bring them back without a phone call
Insurance and intake paperwork gets handled automatically, so your chair time is 100% patient time
You see exactly which services drive the most revenue per chair-hour before the month ends
A homeowner finds you on Google at midnight and books a quote without calling
Your follow-up texts go out automatically — no more chasing down cold leads
New crew members get onboarded with an AI assistant that answers their questions
You know exactly which job types are most profitable before the month ends
Reservations, waitlist, and catering inquiries handled 24/7 — no phone tag
Every Google review gets a smart, personalized response within minutes
Your regulars get personalized outreach when their usual order is on special
You see your most profitable menu items and peak-margin shifts at a glance every week
Prospective clients book discovery calls, fill intake forms, and get pre-consult docs — before you've had coffee
Every proposal you send gets a smart follow-up sequence that re-engages without being pushy
Client communications are drafted in seconds — consistent, polished, on-brand every time
You know exactly which service lines have the best close rate and margin — without a spreadsheet
Customer support tickets — returns, order status, FAQs — handled automatically without you
Cart abandoners get personalized recovery sequences that bring back 10–15% of lost sales
Product descriptions, ads, and emails write themselves based on your catalog data
You see which SKUs, channels, and campaigns are actually profitable — updated daily
Leads book themselves 24/7 without you touching the calendar
Ghosted leads come back on their own via smart follow-up sequences
Customer questions get answered instantly, any time of day
You get clear data on what's actually working in your business — without building spreadsheets

questions.question: Do you think your competitors are using AI right now?

options.label: I have no idea — I haven't thought about it
Probably not — my industry is pretty old-school
Some of them probably are, but I'm not sure how
Definitely — and I'm worried about falling behind

questions.question: Would you trust AI to handle a customer interaction without a human checking first?

options.label: Absolutely not — a human needs to be involved every time
Maybe for simple stuff — confirming appointments, answering FAQs
Yes, for most routine interactions — I'd review edge cases only
Totally — if it's trained on my business, I'd trust it to run unsupervised

questions.question: If an AI tool could reliably solve one of those problems — what kind of resources would you put behind it?

options.label: I'd try a free version first to see if it works
Under $200/month if it saves real time
$200–$500/month for clear ROI
Whatever it takes — I need this problem solved

questions.question: If you found the right solution, what's your timeline?

options.label: I'd want to research and think it over
A few weeks — I'd want to see a demo first
Within a week if it looks right
I'd start tomorrow if I found the right thing

scoring.note: Max 127. Boundaries derived from answer profiles: all-A=1, all-B=26, all-C=84, all-D=127. Tiers sit at natural behavioral divides.

lead_scoring.formula_note: Computed separately from quiz score. Stored in Supabase quiz_leads table. A9+A8 weight urgency and investment willingness. A4 count signals pain awareness.

tiers.action: immediate follow-up — Mack or Patrick directly
